text:
龍族は、親玉を抑えちまって
統制を崩す方が早いかもしれねえな。

集団のなかに紛れてるデカブツを
優先的に叩いて行こうと思う。

龍族の分類については
あんたの方が明るいだろ？
見つけ次第、討伐を頼むぜ

For the Draconians, we might want to break
their chain of command by dealing with
their leaders.

I say we give priority to the big guys that
show up in their swarms.

You're smarter than I am when it comes to
classifying Draconians, though. Just take out
the important ones when you spot 'em.
